summary: Excellent UltraMatrix soundboard/matrix capture of an electrifying 1988 Meadowlands show, highlighted by a scorching Scarlet Begonias → Fire on the Mountain.
review: Both reviewers rave about the crystal‑clear UltraMatrix recording and the high‑octane performance at the Meadowlands. The show is described as “on fire,” with the Scarlet Begonias into Fire on the Mountain sequence standing out as a peak moment, and the mix is praised as killer and masterful.

ai_rating.rationale: Two detailed 5‑star reviews praise both the musical performance and the technical quality; weighting favors the superb show and excellent matrix recording, yielding an almost perfect rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Killer UltraMatrix (soundboard + audience) mix, crisp clarity, well‑balanced levels; no reported dropouts or muffiness.

standout_songs: Scarlet Begonias > Fire on the Mountain
show_quality.setlist_flow: High energy throughout; band warming up early but quickly hitting a fiery groove, with the crew’s capture keeping the momentum intact.
